info.name: Secure Video Streaming API (Java)
info.description: Postman Collection for the Spring Boot Backend endpoints

exec: console.log("Token automatically saved to collection variables!");
// Visualize HTTP response metadata for the video stream request
const statusLabel = statusCode === 206 ? 'Partial Content ✓' : statusCode === 200 ? 'OK ✓' : 'Status ' + statusCode;
body { font-family: 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; background: #0f0f1a; color: #e0e0e0; margin: 0; padding: 20px; }
.grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px; }
.card-label { font-size: 11px; color: #888; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
.status-badge { display: inline-block; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; }
.info-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; background: #1a1a2e; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; }
.info-table th { background: #2d2d44; color: #a78bfa; padding: 10px 14px; text-align: left; font-size: 12px; text-transform: uppercase; }
.bar-container { background: #2d2d44; border-radius: 6px; height: 18px; margin-top: 8px; overflow: hidden; }
.bar-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 6px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #a78bfa, #3498db); transition: width 0.5s; }
.section-title { color: #a78bfa; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; margin: 20px 0 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; }
xAxes: [{ stacked: true, ticks: { fontColor: '#aaa' }, gridLines: { color: '#2d2d44' } }],
yAxes: [{ stacked: true, ticks: { fontColor: '#aaa' }, gridLines: { color: '#2d2d44' } }]

header.description: Optional: Simulates a partial content request from a browser video player.

query.description: Get this from the Presigned URL response
Get this from the Presigned URL response

request.description: Note: You need to manually copy the `token` and `exp` from the 'Generate Presigned URL' response and paste them into the query parameters here to test it.

exec: // Video Stream Simulation - Chunk Progress Tracker
// Track cumulative chunks in collection variable
const alreadyExists = chunks.find(function(c) { return c.name === chunkName; });
body { font-family: 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; background: #0f0f1a; color: #e0e0e0; margin: 0; padding: 20px; }
.progress-label { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 13px; }

.progress-bar-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 8px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #a78bfa, #3b82f6); display: flex; align-items: center; padding-left: 10px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold; color: #fff; }
.chunks-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr); gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
.chunk-card { background: #1a1a2e; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px; text-align: center; border: 2px solid #2d2d44; }
.stats-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
.stat-label { font-size: 10px; color: #888; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 4px; }
var chunkData = data.chunks.find(function(c) { return c.name === name; });
title: { display: true, text: 'Chunk Response Times', fontColor: '#a78bfa' },

request.description: Generated from cURL: curl -X GET "{{baseUrl}}/video/stream/sample-22.mp4?token={{video_token}}&exp={{video_exp}}" -H "Range: bytes=0-1048575"
